user.title: ESPEasy P2P
user.description: Listen for ESPEasy C013 broadcasts and actively scan for peers.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one ESPEasy P2P listener can be configured.

init.title: Switch configuration
init.description: Pick a task to set its GPIO pin or command template, or choose 'Save and close' when you are done. {task_count} task(s) listed.

edit.title: Edit '{task}' on unit {unit}
edit.description:
Set the BCM GPIO pin (the integration sends 'gpio,PIN,STATE'), or a command template — useful for stock ESPEasy with rules. Examples:

• Stock ESPEasy + rule: 'event,schluessel' triggers 'On schluessel do … endon' on the node.
• Direct helper: 'door,{state}' (the placeholder {state} is replaced with 0 or 1).

If both fields are filled, the template wins. Tick 'Remove this entry' to delete the override entirely.

abort.no_switch_tasks: No switch-eligible tasks have been discovered yet. Wait for nodes to announce or run the 'Scan for nodes' service, then reopen this dialog.

scan.name: Scan for nodes
scan.description: Broadcast a node-info packet so all reachable ESPEasy nodes immediately announce themselves.

remove_node.name: Remove node
remove_node.description: Forget a node and remove its HA device, sensors and switches. The node will reappear if it sends a new heartbeat.
